```python
import sys
import requests
from pymemshaper import Memshaper

# Set the target system and the database to hack
target = "example.com"
database = "example_db"

# Create a Memshaper object to modify the memory of the target system

# Leak all the contents of the database

print(response.text)

# Modify the memory of the target system to leak sensitive information
memshaper.modify_memory()
print("Sensitive information leaked: " + memshaper.get_leaked_data())
```
